_meta.description: Index of Amazon SP-API Data Kiosk GraphQL schemas. Load this first, then read reference/<schema>.graphql for the exact query type name, dataset fields, required arguments, enums, and the per-field @resultRetention durations before authoring a createQuery GraphQL string.
_meta.create_via: create_data_kiosk_query (pass the GraphQL query string; returns queryId)
_meta.fetch_via: get_data_kiosk_document (use the result's dataDocumentId — the field is dataDocumentId, NOT dataDocument; errorDocumentId on FATAL)
_meta.query_shape: A query wraps datasets under the versioned root: { analytics_<area>_<version> { <dataset>(args) { fields } } }
_meta.retention_note: @resultRetention is per-FIELD; the query inherits the SHORTEST retention of any field it selects (and the result document expires after that). Sales & Traffic + Economics fields are mostly P30D (30 days). This is the document/result retention, NOT the queryable history window (startDate may go ~2 years back).
_meta.warehouse_note: SellerSheet ingests Data Kiosk Sales & Traffic into rpt_dk_sales_traffic_by_date / by_asin. To query that synced data instead of authoring a raw query, see the report-data skill.

schemas.note: Adds salesAndTrafficTrends vs 2023_11_15. byDate and byAsin populate different field sets.

schemas.status: prior (still accepted; prefer 2024_04_24 for new queries)

schemas.note: Per-unit fee/cost/margin economics by ASIN/MSKU. economicsPreview/economicsSimulation model fee changes.
1P vendor sourcing/manufacturing analytics. Requires a vendor account.
